scalar_field.source: (1-alpha)*gaussian_smooth_nodal + alpha*per_element_max_within_support_sharp; alpha=smoothstep(BLEND_MIN, BLEND_MAX, max(0, sharp - smooth) / colorRange) when CAD vertex is inside the connected hotspot region (BFS through CAD-mesh adjacency from the smooth-field global peak, including verts whose smoothVon >= smoothMin + REGION_THRESHOLD_FROM_PEAK*(smoothPeak-smoothMin)); alpha=0 outside the region so smooth dominates and sharp can never paint isolated islands away from the actual concentration; sharp = max(parent_VON over in-radius subset of K=8 nearest-centroid candidate surface tris; in-radius means closest-point distance <= sharpSupportRadiusM)
